title: CPAP follow-up documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports tailored follow-up, CPAP review, annual review after optimisation, symptoms, Epworth score, vigilance and driving, AHI or ODI, adherence, treatment experience, sleep hygiene, and clinician-reviewed sleep-study follow-up.

source.title: Obstructive sleep apnoea/hypopnoea syndrome and obesity hypoventilation syndrome in over 16s
source.population: People aged over 16 years with suspected or diagnosed obstructive sleep apnoea/hypopnoea syndrome.
source.setting: Initial assessment, sleep-service referral, diagnostic testing, treatment discussion, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected adult OSAHS symptom, assessment, sleep-study, referral, driving-risk, treatment-discussion, and monitoring fields; not applicable to children and not directly validated for UAE sleep-service or driving pathways.
